sections.paragraph: a verbal of a Piel form, war, siege. Jud. 5:8 , אָז לָחֶם שְׁעָרִים “then was there a besieging of the gates,” i.e. the gates were besieged. Segol for Tsere (which is found in some MSS.) is put, on account of the construct state; although similar instances are not to be met with. [See Thes.]
